ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_sites" (
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch site */,
  "launch_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch site */,
  "launch_site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the launch site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the launch site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the launch site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Falcon 1, Falcon 9) */,
  "liftoff_thrust" REAL /* Liftoff thrust of the vehicle (kN) */,
  "payload_to_orbit" REAL /* Payload to orbit capacity of the vehicle (kg) */,
  "vehicle_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload (e.g., Communication Satellite) */,
  "payload_mass" REAL /* Mass of the payload (kg) */,
  "payload_orbit" TEXT /* Orbit of the payload (e.g., Low Earth Orbit) */,
  "payload_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that launched the vehicle */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time of the launch */,
  "launch_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch site */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of launch (° F) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of launch (MPH) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of launch (%) */,
  "launch_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_launch_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_site_id") REFERENCES launch_sites ("launch_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the launch */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payload */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for mission failure (if applicable) */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_payload_id FOREIGN KEY ("payload_id") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rocket_configurations" (
  "rocket_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rocket configuration */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "rocket_height" REAL /* Height of the rocket (m) */,
  "fairing_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the fairing (m) */,
  "stages" INTEGER /* Number of stages in the rocket */,
  "engines" INTEGER /* Number of engines in the rocket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rocket_config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rocket_configurations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Launch Engineer, Mission Control Specialist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "launch_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has launch access */,
  "vehicle_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has vehicle access */,
  "payload_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has payload access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
